changelog: Fix: Mod file paths corrected to match actual Roblox macOS structure
Fix: Death sound, cursors, fonts now target Contents/Resources
Fix: Fonts updated from Gotham to BuilderSans (current Roblox fonts)
Removed: Skybox category (uses binary .tex format, not swappable)
Pro: Custom mod imports for premium categories
Fix: FastFlags editor and advanced settings properly locked for free users
